news.summary: Catherine will visit Reggio Emilia, an Italian city celebrated for its approach to early childhood education.

news.headline: Europe Tries a Trumpian Tactic With Trump: No Apologies
news.summary: Stuck with the fallout from America’s war in Iran, European leaders have criticized the president publicly. When he’s been angered, they haven’t backed down.

news.headline: How China Could Wield Its Control of Rare Earths Against Trump
news.summary: A central question hanging over the summit this week is whether China will agree to extend a temporary postponement of even tougher rare-earth export controls.

news.headline: Chinese company that tracked US bombers over Iran wears sanctions with pride
news.summary:
